CHECKLIST / MODULE 7 / LESSON 3: WEBINAR SALES PAGE
WEBINAR SALES PAGE CHECKLIST
There are two options for creating your webinar sales page (whether it’s
the webinar abbreviated sales page or the webinar funnel sales page):
Sales Video Only Option
✓ 	Don’t assume they’ve seen anything about your product prior to this point
✓ 	Probably fairly long
✓ 	Buy button that appears when price is revealed
Complete Sales Page Option
✓ 	Sales video (probably a shorter version than the sales video only option)
✓ 	Text-based sales letter below the video
✓ 	There will be duplication between sales video and text (that’s o.k.)
Here is a simple outline and checklist for your webinar sales page:
✓ 	Identify the problem
✓ 	Articulate how that problem affects them
✓ 	Tell your hero’s journey story
✓ 	Introduce the product (follow the same formula you used in the webinar)
✓ 	Include several testimonials
✓ 	Don’t be boring
✓ 	Use compelling images
✓ 	Visually break up the page, with each section being visibly separated
from the others around it
✓ 	Use headlines for each section to draw people through it
✓ 	Clearly provide buy buttons and the price
